{{Infobox character
| name = Maten sisters
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] use [[Ruler techniques]] to strip logs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] are members of [[Lindon]]'s team who do not talk much to anyone but each other.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] avoided capture and are safe.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
